children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: From amounts made available to carry out this chapter, for each of the fiscal years 2014 through 2023, the Secretary shall purchase a dollar amount described in paragraph (2) of a variety of nutritious and useful commodities of the types that the Secretary has the authority to acquire through the Commodity Credit Corporation or under and distribute the commodities to States for distribution in accordance with .section 612c of this titlesection 7515 of this title

children.label: C
children.text: for each of fiscal years 2010 through 2023, the dollar amount of commodities specified in subparagraph (B) adjusted by the percentage by which the thrifty food plan has been adjusted under between , and June 30 of the immediately preceding fiscal year;section 2012(u)(3) of this titleJune 30, 2008

children.label: E
children.text: for fiscal year 2024 and each subsequent fiscal year, the total dollar amount of commodities specified in subparagraph (D)(ix) adjusted by the percentage by which the thrifty food plan has been adjusted under to reflect changes between , and June 30 of the immediately preceding fiscal year.section 2012(u)(3) of this titleJune 30, 2023

children.label: A
children.text: make the funds available for 2 fiscal years; and

children.label: B
children.text: allow States to carry over unexpended balances to the next fiscal year pursuant to such terms and conditions as are determined by the Secretary.
preferences and needs of States and distributing agencies; and
